name: io.github.cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare
description: MCP server for Cloudflare — manage Workers, KV, R2, D1, and DNS

tools.name: worker_list
tools.description: List all Cloudflare Workers in the account

tools.name: kv_get
tools.description: Get a value from Cloudflare KV

tools.name: kv_put
tools.description: Put a value into Cloudflare KV

tools.name: dns_list_records
tools.description: List DNS records for a zone
